A A

A focused Latvian verb trainer built for daily practice.

  • 500+ verbs with real example sentences
  • Core forms — tagadne, pagātne, nākotne, vēlējuma izteiksme, pavēles izteiksme
  • Smart frequency weighting & learning presets
  • Voice dictation with instant feedback 🎤
  • Text-to-speech pronunciation 🔊
  • Full conjugation tables for every verb 📖
  • Offline support (PWA)

Progress and settings save automatically.

Latvian Verb Patterns & Tips

Present Tense

Tip: Learn the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd person singular together first. Many Latvian verbs build the plural forms from that same stem.

Rhythm: "es runāju, tu runā, viņš runā... mēs runājam, jūs runājat, viņi runā"

Example: runāt → es runāju, tu runā, viņš/viņa runā, mēs runājam, jūs runājat, viņi runā

Past Tense

Tip: The past is often very regular once you know the infinitive class. Watch the long vowels and stress, especially in the singular forms.

Example: runāt → es runāju, tu runāji, viņš/viņa runāja, mēs runājām, jūs runājāt, viņi runāja

Future Tense

Pattern: Future endings are easier to hear when you say the full set aloud: -šu, -si, -s, -sim, -siet, -s.

Example: runāt → es runāšu, tu runāsi, viņš/viņa runās, mēs runāsim, jūs runāsiet, viņi runās

Key Irregular Verbs

būt: esmu, esi, ir, esam, esat, ir

iet: eju, ej, iet, ejam, ejat, iet

Tip: Keep a short list of truly irregular verbs separate from the regular patterns. They come up constantly, so they are worth overlearning.
